name: Apple Country Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 large Golden Delicious apple, cored and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the curry powder in a wide frying pan and stir over medium heat until it is slightly darker in color (about 3-4 minutes).
2. Add the chopped apple, yellow onion, lemon juice, mushrooms, chicken bouillon, and 1 1/2 cups of the apple juice to the pan. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry. Add the chicken to the pan. Reduce the heat, cover, and simmer until the meat near the bone is no longer pink (about 30 minutes). Test by cutting into the meat. Remove the chicken and arrange it on a warm platter. Keep warm.
4. Blend the flour with the remaining 1/2 cup of apple juice. Gradually add this mixture to the sauce in the pan, stirring continuously. Increase the heat to high and cook until the sauce is thickened. Pour the sauce over the chicken. The sauce also tastes good poured over baked potato or rice.
(Note: This recipe yields approximately 305 calories with 7 grams of fat.)
